WORKOUT SYSTEM
Book photos: make an images/ folder beside this file and copy your screenshots into it exactly as they came off your device (e.g. IMG_3365.PNG) — no renaming needed. Each exercise picks up its own page automatically, and a Book photo tab appears next to the 3-D model.
